name: China Kepei Education Group Limited
summary: China Kepei Education Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides private higher education services focusing on profession-oriented education. It operates Guangdong Polytechnic College, a degree-granting undergraduate-level education institution that offers 41 majors, including 29 undergraduate majors and 20 junior college majors in a range of subject areas. The company also operates Zhaoqing Science and Technology Secondary Vocational School, a secondary vocational school, which provides secondary vocational education in 12 majors comprising automobile servicing, electronic commerce, and electromechanical technology application. As of December 31, 2019, it had an aggregate of 57,924 students enrolled at its schools located in Guangdong Province, the People's Republic of China. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Zhaoqing, the People's Republic of China.
